MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Advanced From Feb-16-16 To Oct-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account.
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Katheryn Stebner, Esq. and George Kawamoto, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Nancy McHugh, sister and guardian ad litem for Person with a Disability, Patricia McHugh.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $350,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $140,000.00 payable to Law Firm of Stebner and Associates
Costs: $21,833.94
A net balance of $166,834.79 to be deposited into a blocked account at:
Chase Bank, Middletown Shopping Center Branch, 1361 State Route 35, Suite 1, Middletown, New Jersey 07748 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Person with a Disability and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on 2/11/2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.
